debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)

simp [hidx1]
      have h₅ : l1[idx1] ∈ l1.eraseIdx idx1 := by
        -- Use the fact that the element at index `idx1` is in the list and can be
        -- removed if it appears multiple times
        simp [List.mem_erase, List.get] at h₄ ⊢
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
            <;>
            aesop
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
            <;>
            omega
          })
        <;>
        aesop
      exact h₅
    have h₆ : ∃ (i : Fin (l1.eraseIdx idx1).length), (l1.eraseIdx idx1)[i] = l1[idx1] := by
      have h₇ : l1[idx1] ∈ l1.eraseIdx idx1 := h₃
      have h₈ : ∃ (i : Fin (l1.eraseIdx idx1).length), (l1.eraseIdx idx1)[i] = l1[idx1] := by
        apply List.exists_fin_eq_of_mem
        <;>
        simp_all
      exact h₈
    exact h₆
  
  obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := h₂
  have h₃ : (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ⟨(List.take idx (l.map List.length)).sum + (l1.eraseIdx idx1).length - 1, by
